Container.Name: ollama-intel-gpu
Container.Overview: Ollama for Intel Arc GPUs (B580, A770, A750, etc.) powered by Intel IPEX-LLM. Drop-in replacement for the standard Ollama container — exposes the same API on port 11434. Requires an Intel Arc GPU
Container.Requires: Intel Arc GPU (B580, A770, A750, or other Arc series) with kernel driver loaded.

Config.Name: Model Storage
Config.Description: Path on the host for persistent model storage. Models are large (4-20 GB each).

Config.Name: OLLAMA_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Allowed origins for CORS. Set to * to allow Open WebUI and other frontends to connect.

Config.Name: ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR
Config.Description: Select which Intel GPU to use. Use level_zero:0 for the first GPU. Change only if you have multiple Intel GPUs.

Config.Name: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL
Config.Description: Number of parallel inference requests. Set to 1 for 12 GB VRAM cards (B580). Increase only if you have more VRAM.

Config.Name: OLLAMA_NUM_CTX
Config.Description: Context window size in tokens. Larger values use more VRAM. Default 4096 is a good balance for 12 GB cards.

Config.Name: OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE
Config.Description: How long to keep a model loaded in VRAM after the last request. Use 5m for 5 minutes, -1 for forever, 0 to unload immediately.
